QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_19

question.text: Should intermediaries put restrictions on operations in accounts where an STR has been filed?

answer.text: Yes, but only for high-value accounts
No, intermediaries shall not put restrictions on such accounts
Yes, accounts should be frozen immediately after filing STR
Yes, for at least 30 days after filing

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.3.9, intermediaries shall not put any restrictions on operations in the accounts where an STR has been made. **The Trap:** It may seem logical to freeze accounts after filing an STR but this would tip off the client. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Continuity in dealing with the client must be maintained until told otherwise by the authorities.
